findings.description: In the PDF, 'EMC Model Approval' appears once in a merged cell in the Cape Fear – Neuse River Basin Hydrologic Model column, spanning approximately the 1/1/2013 through 5/1/2013 rows. The HTML duplicates this text into four separate rows (1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, and 5/1/2013), converting a single merged cell into repeated data.
findings.evidence: PDF: single merged cell reading 'EMC Model Approval' spanning multiple rows. HTML: EMC Model Approval appears in rows for 1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, and 5/1/2013.

findings.description: The footnote URL http://www.doodle.com/5ctdbuc2n3akshim appears as plain text in the HTML and is not wrapped in an <a href> tag.
